Class Loan

java.lang.Object
com.library.model.Loan
public class Loan extends Object
Represents a book loan (borrowing record) in the Library Management System.

Maps to the loans table in the database: 

  id (PK) | book_id (FK) | reader_id (FK) | loan_date | due_date | status

This is the associative entity between Book and Reader (M:N). The fields bookTitle and readerName are denormalized JOIN values — populated by DAO queries and not stored in the loans table.

The status field is constrained by the database to one of:

  • "active" — book is currently borrowed
  • "returned" — book has been returned
  • "overdue" — return deadline has passed

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private int
    bookId
    FK referencing books.id.
    private String
    bookTitle
    Denormalized book title populated via JOIN in DAO queries.
    private LocalDate
    dueDate
    Deadline by which the book must be returned.
    private int
    id
    Primary key.
    private LocalDate
    loanDate
    Date the book was lent out.
    private int
    readerId
    FK referencing readers.id.
    private String
    readerName
    Denormalized reader name populated via JOIN in DAO queries.
    private String
    status
    Borrowing status: "active", "returned", or "overdue".

  • Field Details

    • id

      private int id
      Primary key. Set by the database on INSERT.

    • bookId

      private int bookId
      FK referencing books.id.

    • bookTitle

      private String bookTitle
      Denormalized book title populated via JOIN in DAO queries. Not stored in the loans table; used only for display.

    • readerId

      private int readerId
      FK referencing readers.id.

    • readerName

      private String readerName
      Denormalized reader name populated via JOIN in DAO queries. Not stored in the loans table; used only for display.

    • loanDate

      private LocalDate loanDate
      Date the book was lent out. Defaults to CURRENT_DATE in the database.

    • dueDate

      private LocalDate dueDate
      Deadline by which the book must be returned. Must be after loanDate (validated in the UI).

    • status

      private String status
      Borrowing status: "active", "returned", or "overdue". Constrained by a DB CHECK; defaults to "active".

  • Constructor Details

    • Loan

      public Loan()
      No-arg constructor required for DAO result mapping.

    • Loan

      public Loan(int id, int bookId, String bookTitle, int readerId, String readerName, LocalDate loanDate, LocalDate dueDate, String status)
      Full constructor used by LoanDaoImpl when mapping a ResultSet.
      Parameters:
      id - primary key
      bookId - FK to the book
      bookTitle - denormalized book title from JOIN
      readerId - FK to the reader
      readerName - denormalized reader name from JOIN
      loanDate - date of borrowing
      dueDate - return deadline
      status - one of: "active", "returned", "overdue"

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Returns:
      primary key of this loan

    • getBookId

      public int getBookId()
      Returns:
      FK to the books table

    • getBookTitle

      denormalized book title (populated by JOIN, not stored)

    • getReaderId

      public int getReaderId()
      Returns:
      FK to the readers table

    • getReaderName

      public String getReaderName()
      Returns:
      denormalized reader name (populated by JOIN, not stored)

    • getLoanDate

      public LocalDate getLoanDate()
      Returns:
      date the book was lent out

    • getDueDate

      public LocalDate getDueDate()
      Returns:
      return deadline

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Returns:
      status string: "active", "returned", or "overdue"

    • setId

      public void setId(int id)
      Parameters:
      id - primary key (assigned after INSERT)

    • setBookId

      public void setBookId(int bookId)
      Parameters:
      bookId - FK to the book (must reference an existing book)

    • setBookTitle

      public void setBookTitle(String t)
      Parameters:
      t - denormalized book title used for display

    • setReaderId

      public void setReaderId(int readerId)
      Parameters:
      readerId - FK to the reader (must reference an existing reader)

    • setReaderName

      public void setReaderName(String n)
      Parameters:
      n - denormalized reader name used for display

    • setLoanDate

      public void setLoanDate(LocalDate d)
      Parameters:
      d - date of borrowing

    • setDueDate

      public void setDueDate(LocalDate d)
      Parameters:
      d - return deadline (must be after loan date)

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(String status)
      Parameters:
      status - one of: "active", "returned", "overdue"
